prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热 推荐，与南京大学物理类招生专业高度匹配；辽宁省2026年物理类考生估算约14.36万人，较2025年基本持平；省控线（本科批）2021–2025年稳定在336–368分区间，2026年数据 缺失，；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，非辽宁省本地高校；该校在辽宁招生规模较小（34人），跨省报考需考虑地域偏好，但南京作为东部发达城市 对辽宁考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅反弹至475名的基准、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数基本稳定、学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热、优势学科吸引 力强等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在475名基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约483名，区间428–538名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 427 → 526 → 502 → 609 → 475, showing a fluctuating upward then downward trend; after reaching a peak of 609 in 2024, it rebounded significantly to 475 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 134 positions in the last two years, and a baseline ranking of about 475 in 2025; enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 32, 33, 34, 33, 34 respectively, and the 2026 plan remains at 34, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 5th in the 2021 Soft Science China University Rankings and stable at 6th from 2022 to 2026, firmly among the top universities in the country with an extremely high academic level.
4. [Reputation Heat] During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving cafeteria, dormitory, and management-related public opinion; Douyin comprehensive heat ranking is 17th (high heat), with relatively large short video exposure and high application attention; historical abnormal admission signals include medium attention in 2022 (differences in major group admission cutoffs), with no obvious gaps recorded; Nanjing University has 26 A- or above disciplines, among which Astronomy, Geology, Atmospheric Science, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science and Technology, and Business Administration are A+, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates significantly.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the Physics Category enrollment majors at Nanjing University; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province for 2026 is about 143,600, basically unchanged from 2025; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been stable in the range of 336–368 points from 2021 to 2025, with 2026 data missing; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing City, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Liaoning; its enrollment scale in Liaoning is small (34 people), and cross-province applications need to consider regional preferences, but Nanjing, as an eastern developed city, still has strong appeal to Liaoning candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline of a significant rebound to 475 in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, basically stable total number of candidates, slightly negative school reputation but high Douyin heat, and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease from 475, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 483, and a range of 428–538.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Artificial Intelligence
- Computer Science and Technology (including Zhicheng Class, Computer Finance Experimental Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming College Big Science Class/Lixing Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Class
- Software Engineering (including Intelligent Software, Zhicheng Class)
- Technology Science Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Technology, Integrated Circuits, etc.)
- Financial Engineering (Computer Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences)
- Clinical Medicine (Excellent Physician Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 428–538, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology, Kuang Yaming College classes have the highest ranking requirements), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 420), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 530), mainly apply for Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 129, 134, 148, 131, and 157 respectively, showing a fluctuating upward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 28 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 157, the highest (largest number) in the past 5 years; enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 6, 8, 12, 13, and 13 students, continuously expanding; the 2026 plan increases to 16 students, an increase of 3 students (+23.1%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 6th nationally in the Soft Science ranking, with an extremely high level of education, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts students; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (cafeteria, dormitory, and management-related public opinion); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 17th (high heat), with relatively high application attention; historical abnormal admission signals show medium attention in 2022, with no obvious gaps; Nanjing University has outstanding advantages in liberal arts: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literatures A+, Philosophy A, Law A, Sociology A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A-, etc., strongly attracting History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law popularity is polarized and wait-and-see, Economics and Management are polarized and wait-and-see, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, matching the enrollment majors for History Category; the estimated number of History Category students in Liaoning Province for 2026 is about 56,400, roughly the same as 2025; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing City, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Liaoning Province; cross-province applications need to consider regional preferences, but Nanjing, as an eastern developed city, has a strong appeal to liberal arts students from Liaoning.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 157 in 2025, a significant 23% expansion in 2026, roughly the same total number of students, a slightly negative school reputation but high Douyin popularity, and extremely strong liberal arts disciplines, the expansion effect will push the ranking number larger (easier to enter), predicting a minimum ranking of about 184, with a range of 163 to 205.
